programs.programName: North Dakota Basic Care Assistance Program (BCAP)

verified.notes: Program active as of 2026; eligibility tied to ND Medicaid (no specific BCAP asset limit found; Medicaid typically $3,000 individual for LTC per non-gov sources); age is 65+ or 18+ blind/disabled but structured as null per schema; no phone digits found

programs.programName: North Dakota Aging in Community (AIC) Project

verified.notes: Program appears active as of 2026. Age requirement not specified in available sources. Income and asset limits not found in search results. Phone number (855-462-5465) is for North Dakota's Aging & Disability Resource Link, the state agency contact for aging services; specific AIC application phone not located in provided sources.

verified.notes: Program eligibility based on age (60+), North Dakota residency, and not residing in nursing facility. No income or asset limits found in search results. Funding is limited and need-based; program is not an entitlement. Phone number is official ND Assistive contact for Senior Safety Program.
